snippet.description:

snippet.title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer | Pawan Kalyan | Harish Shankar | Sreeleela | Raashii Khanna
snippet.description:
Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer on Mythri Movie Makers. 

Ustaad Bhagat Singh is an Upcoming Telugu movie ft. Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna & others. Music composed by Rockstar Devi Sri Prasad, Written and Directed by Harish Shankar.S. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers Banner.

In Cinemas March 19th, 2026.

#UstaadBhagatSinghTrailer #UstaadBhagatSingh #PawanKalyan #HarishShankar #Sreeleela #RaashiiKhanna #DeviSriPrasad #DSP #NaveenYerneni #RaviShankar #MythriMovieMakers

Cast & Crew Details :

Cast: Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna, Parthiban & Others

Technical Crew:
Written & Directed by: Harish Shankar.S
Producers: Naveen Yerneni, Ravi Shankar Yalamanchili
Music: Devi Sri Prasad
Background Score: Thaman S
Screenplay: K Dasharath, Ramesh Reddy
Additional writing: Praveen Varma and Chandramohan.
Editing: Karthika Srinivas 
Production Designer: Anand Sai 
CEO: Cherry
Executive Producers: R Chandrasekhar, Dinesh Narasimhan 
Creative Producer: Harish Pai 
Fights : Ram Laxman, Nabakanth, Prudhvi 
Costume Designer(Pawan Kalyan): Neeta Lulla
DI & Sound Mix: Annapurna Studios
Mix Engineer: Kannan Ganpat
Colorist: Venu Gopal Rao J
Marketing: First show
PRO: Venu Gopal

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | SEMI FINALS | Day 3 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The SEMI FINALS of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens. The stakes rise. There is no margin for error now.

After battling through The Grind, Round stages, Quarter Finals and Wildcard, only the strongest remain. Every match carries weight. Every fight moves teams one step closer to the Grand Finals.

This is where contenders turn into finalists.

Watch the SEMI FINALS live and witness who takes the next step toward the championship stage.

Follow us on X: https://x.com/KIEOFFICIAL_

ы│╕ ь╜ШэЕРь╕аыКФ 1896ыЕД 5ьЫФ 8ьЭ╝ьЮР The Washington PostьЧР ьЛдыж░ эХЬъ╡н ь▓ныЕД 7ьЭ╕ьЭШ ьЭ┤ьХ╝ъ╕░(тАЬSeven Koreans at Howard")ьЩА, ьЭ┤ыУд ьдС ьЭ╝ы╢Аъ░А ъ░ЩьЭА эХ┤ 7ьЫФ 24ьЭ╝ ып╕ъ╡н ьЫМьЛ▒эД┤ D.C.ьЧРьДЬ эХЬъ╡н ь╡Ьь┤ИьЭШ ьЭМьЫРьЭД ыЕ╣ьЭМэХЬ ъ╕░ыбЭьЧРьДЬ ьШБъ░РьЭД ы░ЫьХД ъ╕░эЪНыРШьЧИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. эХЬъ╡ньЧРьДЬ ъ▒┤ыДИъ░Д ь▓ныЕДыУдьЭШ ьЛдьаЬ ыкйьЖМыжмъ░А ыЛ┤ъ╕┤ ьЧньВмьаБ ъ╕░ыбЭъ│╝ ь╡Ьь┤ИьЭШ ьХДыжмыЮС ыЕ╣ьЭМьЭ┤ыЭ╝ыКФ ым╕эЩФьаБ ьЭШып╕ые╝ ыкиэЛ░ы╕МыбЬ ьВ╝ьХД эШДыМАьаБ ьГБьГБыаеьЧР ъ╕░ы░ШэХШьЧм ьЮмъ╡мьД▒ ы░П ь░╜ьЮСыРЬ ъ▓ГьЬ╝ыбЬ, ьЛдьаЬьЩА ыЛдые╝ ьИШ ьЮИьЬ╝ый░ ьЧньВмьаБ ьВмъ▒┤ьЭ┤ыВШ ьЭ╕ым╝ьЧР ыМАэХЬ эПЙъ░А┬╖эХ┤ьДЭъ│╝ыКФ ым┤ъ┤АэХиьЭД ы░ЭэЮЩыЛИыЛд.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (тАЬSeven Koreans at HowardтАЭ), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of тАЬArirang.тАЭ This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:
Director: Hur Sungwhe
Art Director: L├йa Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo
Line Producer: Kim Yulee, Sungwan Lim, Kim Min Ju, Jiwon Lee
Storyboard Artist: Lee Seung gyu

Character Designer: Younhyung Ku, Seonga Kwon, Lena Sayaphoum, Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee
Background Designer: L├йa Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim
Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

2D Animation Supervisor: Cho Hea Seung, SeokWoo Kim
2D Animator: Kim Jiyul, Woo Ji Yeon, Choi Ji Hyun, Choi Yu Mi, Park Yun Seo, Yang Eun Ji, Jeong Yunbi, Lee Min Ji, Jun Hye Jin, Dabin Jung, So-dam Jeong, Ryoun-Ki Hong, Jin-young Go
2D Animation Timer: Park Dae Yeol, Jo Ahra
2D Effects Artist: Ina Choi

'Arirang' Composer & Piano: Goldbranch
Sound Designer: Jang Mi Ra

#BTS #ы░йэГДьЖМыЕДыЛи #BTS_ARIRANG

snippet.title: Main Vaapas Aaunga | Official Teaser | Imtiaz Ali, A. R. Rahman, Diljit, Vedang, Sharvari, Naseer
snippet.description:
In Imtiaz AliтАЩs world, love is never just a feeling. It is a journey that lingers in stolen glances, unfinished conversations and memories that refuse to fade away. MAIN VAAPAS AAUNGA  is one such journey - a story of love and longing.

A Film by Imtiaz Ali

Starring: Diljit Dosanjh, Naseeruddin Shah, Vedang Raina, Sharvari
Music Composed, Produced, and Arranged by: A. R. Rahman 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Written by Imtiaz Ali, Nayanika Mahtani
Director Of Photography: Sylvester Fonseca, ISC
Production Designer: Suman Roy Mahapatra
Editor: Aarti Bajaj
Sound Designer & Production Sound Mixer: Dhiman Karmakar
Costume Designer: Sheetal Iqbal Sharma
Look Designer: Soamaa Goswami
Re-recording Mixer: Alok De
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Associate Director: Suraj Paraswani
First Assistant Director: Adrian Fernandes
Post Producer: Chinmay Ogale
Publicity Design: (H-One) Rahul Nanda, Himanshu Nanda
Visual Effects: Phantom FX
Color: Redchillies.color
Visual Promotions: MA+TH
Digital Promotions: The Small Big Idea
Public Relations: Universal Communications
CMO & Head of Syndication: Sameer Chopra
WSF Marketing: Nidhi Sethia, Gautam Ahuja, Anushka Arora
Applause Marketing: Devnidhi Bajoria
Supervising Producer (Applause): Sneha Vashist
Co Producers: Sunil Chainani, Prasoon Garg
Executive Producers: Vishal Bajaj, Pratik Nandkumar More
Produced by Sameer Nair, Deepak Segal
Produced by Window Seat Films, Mohit Choudhary, Shibhasish Sarkar
Music on Tips

Main Vaapas Aaunga, Releasing on 12th June 2026 in theatres near you.

#MainVaapasAaunga #ImitiazAli #DiljitDosanjh #NaseeruddinShah #VedangRaina #SharvariWagh #Teaser #LoveStory #ApplauseEntertainment

id.title: Vaapas Aaunga Utama | Penggoda Resmi | Imtiaz Ali, A.R. Rahman, Diljit, Vedang, Sharvari, Naseer
id.description:
Dalam dunia Imtiaz Ali, cinta bukanlah sekadar perasaan. Ia adalah sebuah perjalanan yang terukir dalam tatapan curi-curi, percakapan yang tak tuntas, dan kenangan yang tak mau pudar. MAIN VAAPAS AAUNGA adalah salah satu perjalanan tersebut - sebuah kisah tentang cinta dan kerinduan.

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh DтАЩSouza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
DirectorтАЩs Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: #4k Video Chhaudi Bhatar Khojo Hain | #Ashish Yadav & #Anjali Bharti | New Magahi Song 2026
snippet.description:

snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Teaser of the most anticipated movie of the year - тАЬMantra MuugdhaтАЭ

Get ready to be spellbound in Anupam PatnaikтАЩs magical and maddening cinematic journey, where mystery, music, laughter and the supernatural collide.

A story that will haunt youтАж thrill youтАж and leave you mesmerised.

The spell begins now !!

snippet.title: Zihaal e Miskin (Video) Vishal Mishra, Shreya Ghoshal|Rohit Zinjurke, Nimrit Ahluwalia|Javed-Mohsin
snippet.description:
Presenting the official video of Zihaal e Miskin - the heartbreak song of the season. Featuring Rohit Zinjurke and Nimrit Ahluwalia, this melody has been sung by Vishal Mishra & Shreya Ghoshal, music by Javed-Mohsin And lyrics by Kunaal Vermaa.

#ZihaaleMiskin #RohitZinjurke #NimritKaurAhluwalia  

Create reels on Zihaal e Miskin : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/605950694837426/

Listen to "Zihaal e Miskin" on:

ЁЯОз Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/track/51DEaelXeJJ6cFFYbX8Hal 
ЁЯОз JioSaavn : https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/zihaal-e-miskin/OQAgUxlXTmM
ЁЯОз Wynk Music : https://wynk.in/u/W7uyGgqk2

ЁЯОз  Audio Credits

тЮЯ Music Composer : Javed - Mohsin
тЮЯ Singers : Vishal Mishra & Shreya Ghoshal
тЮЯ Lyrics by : Kunaal Vermaa

Music Team :
тЮЯ Theme written & composed by : Javed-Mohsin
тЮЯ Music Produced by : Jackie Vanjari
тЮЯ Additional Vocals : Arsh Mohammed , Subodhh Sharma , Ravi Mishra , Sam Chandel , Sameer Khan Royal & Aman Khan
тЮЯ Indian Rhythm By : Raju Sardar & Team

snippet.title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we werenтАЩt alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to тАж Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar┬о nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh OтАЩConnor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar┬о winner Colin Firth (The KingтАЩs Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar┬о nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025тАЩs Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award┬о nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industryтАЩs most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award┬о winner, including Oscars┬о for Best Director and Best Picture for SchindlerтАЩs List, which received a total of seven Oscars┬о, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award┬о nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/disclosuredayfilm/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/disclosureday/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@universalpics
X: https://x.com/disclosureday
Hashtag: #DisclosureDay

snippet.title: Sanam Teri Kasam - 8K/4K Music Video | Harshvardhan Rane | Himesh Reshammiya | Ankit Tiwari, Palak M
snippet.description:
Relive the timeless romance with the stunning 8K/4K music video of "Sanam Teri Kasam" from the movie Sanam Teri Kasam. Featuring the heartfelt chemistry of Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane, this soulful track is beautifully composed by Himesh Reshammiya and sung by Ankit Tiwari and Palak Muchhal.

#sanamterikasam #8k #8kvideo #harshvardhanrane #mawrahocane #ankittiwari #palakmuchhal #himeshreshammiya 

Description:
Song - Sanam Teri Kasam
Singer - Ankit Tiwari, Palak Muchhal
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Sameer Anjaan

Lyrics:
Betahasha dil ne
Tujhko hi chaaha hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati namm
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Huaa ye kya hashar mera
Judaa huaa sabar mera
Main tere bin ek lamha
Kyun kabhi naa jiya

Raat bhar ashqo ne tujhko pukara hai
Har dua main maine tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam...

Nasha tera dil ko lagaa
Dena nahi mujhko dagaa
Main teri aadat ka maara
Hai kya meri khataa

Tere bin naamumkin
Apna guzaara hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aakhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Stream/Download ~

~ Music INFO ~
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10


~ Follow Banjaare ~ 
https://www.instagram.com/official_banjaare?igsh=eWd5MGIwbXpscThk&utm_source=qr

Lyrics ~ Banjaare - Bairan
Manne saambh-saambh raakhe
Tere jhanjhraa ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi
Chhori bawle se hore

Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere
Khaaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen konya deti
Haaye...
Bairi tanhaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Ho...
Maarya-maarya phire
Dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi
Ke jeena banjaare ka

Khoya rahun yaad teri
Kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batuwe mein rakhun teri
Saambh ke nishaaniyaan

Tere bina kaal horeya
Theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram dede
Saansa te rihaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Je tu thodi ghabra jya
Meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re main
Aa jaaunga

Todun duniya ki reet
Re ke haar re ke jeet
Manne chahiye teri preet
Main nibha jaaunga

Dekh bawla bana gi
Manne likhna sikha gi
Haaye... noch-noch khaagi
Teri bairan judaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Aaj taai nibhaun jo si
Kasam thi khaai manne
Zindagi saari ya meri
Tere lekhe laai manne

snippet.title: PRX vs. G2 тАФ VALORANT Masters Santiago тАФ Playoffs Stage
snippet.description:
From February 28th to March 15th, the worldтАЩs top VALORANT teams will battle at Masters Santiago, the first global event of the 2026 VALORANT Champions Tour. Twelve teams qualified through Stage 1 tournaments of their respective regional leagues, will compete for Championship Points and a chance to advance toward Champions Shanghai.

WeтАЩre proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: AWS, Coinbase, EWC, Globant, HyperX, Mastercard, OMEN, Red Bull, Secretlab, and Verizon.

Make sure to follow the official VALORANT Esports social channels for additional information:
Twitter/X: https://x.com/valorantesports
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ValorantEsports/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/valorantesports/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@valorantesports
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/valorant
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ValorantEsports
Photos from the Event: https://www.flickr.com/photos/valorantesports/
Official VALORANT Esports News: https://www.valorantesports.com/news
Web: https://www.valorantesports.com

#VCT #VALORANTMasters
